decisions.decision: Include ProbabilityEdit.impactScore in cost basis, attributed proportionally across outcomes based on absolute marginal changes. impactScore is liquidity × KL_divergence which is in currency units, making it semantically valid as cost basis alongside EventTrade.notional.
alternatives_rejected: Exclude ProbabilityEdit from cost basis — simplifies implementation but loses real economic cost of probability edits, contradicts parent plan decision d2
Attribute full impactScore to single outcome with largest probability increase — arbitrary when multiple outcomes shift

decisions.decision: Compute P&L at query time by scanning ORDERS dict. No materialized P&L state. EventTrade cost basis = sum of notional (positive for buys, negative for sells). Unrealized P&L = netSize × currentMarginal - costBasis. Realized P&L = netSize × resolutionProbability - costBasis.
alternatives_rejected: Add ACCOUNT_PNL projection dict synced on each trade — too invasive for first iteration, requires modifying multiple write paths

decisions.decision: Return 404 when account has zero orders in the given market (never participated). Return zero values when orders exist but net P&L is zero. This distinguishes 'never traded' from 'traded but broke even'.
alternatives_rejected: Always return 404 for zero P&L — incorrectly implies no participation
Always return zero values — can't distinguish 'never traded' from 'zero P&L'

decisions.decision: Account-level P&L aggregates across ALL markets including resolved ones. Resolved markets contribute realized P&L, active markets contribute unrealized P&L. Gives lifetime performance view.
alternatives_rejected: Only active markets — hides historical P&L from resolved markets

decisions.decision: Response uses camelCase with top-level 'pnl' key and meta wrapper. Per-outcome breakdown nested under 'outcomes' dict keyed by outcomeId. Market-level summary with totals. Consistent with existing endpoint patterns (make_meta, entity+meta).
alternatives_rejected: Use 'data' top-level key — less descriptive than 'pnl' for a domain-specific endpoint

decisions.decision: For integration tests, create trades on an active market, then resolve it to test realized P&L. Also test unrealized P&L on markets that stay active. Do not manually seed ORDERS since m3 starts resolved with empty order history.
alternatives_rejected: Manually seed ORDERS dict — couples tests to internal data structures, fragile
Test only against m3 — has no order history, would return 404

steps.task: Add P&L computation core in server.py: (a) compute_orders_pnl(market_id, account_id) that scans ORDERS, accumulates per-outcome net_size and cost_basis from EventTrade.notional and ProbabilityEdit.impactScore (proportional attribution), (b) compute_market_pnl(market_id, account_id) that wraps compute_orders_pnl and calculates current_value/unrealized/realized P&L based on market status (active: use marginals; resolved: use resolutionProbabilities). Place helpers near existing account query functions (~line 2075).

Add per-market P&L endpoint handler: get_market_account_pnl(market_id, account_id) that calls compute_market_pnl, serializes response with per-outcome breakdown {outcomeId, netSize, costBasis, currentValue, unrealizedPnl, realizedPnl, totalPnl} and market-level summary {totalCostBasis, totalCurrentValue, totalUnrealizedPnl, totalRealizedPnl, totalPnl}. Returns 404 if market not found or zero orders for account+market. Uses make_meta() for response wrapper.

Add routing for per-market P&L: in route_request, match len(parts)==6 with parts pattern ['v1','markets',marketId,'accounts',accountId,'pnl']. GET only, 405 for other methods. Insert in the market resource patterns section (~line 4535+).

Add account-level P&L endpoint handler: get_account_pnl(account_id) that scans all ORDERS for the account, groups by marketId, calls compute_market_pnl for each, returns per-market breakdown list plus account-level summary {totalPnl, totalUnrealizedPnl, totalRealizedPnl, totalCostBasis, totalCurrentValue}. Returns 404 if account has zero orders across all markets.

Add routing for account-level P&L: in route_request, add 'pnl' to the allowed resources in the account resource pattern (len(parts)==4, parts[3]=='pnl'). GET only. Insert alongside existing risk/exposure/positions routing (~line 4519).

Integration tests in tests/ directory: (a) Test unrealized P&L — create EventTrade buy orders on active market m1, query per-market P&L, verify costBasis=notional, currentValue=netSize×marginal, unrealizedPnl=currentValue-costBasis. (b) Test realized P&L — create trades on m1 or m2, resolve market, verify realizedPnl uses resolutionProbabilities. (c) Test ProbabilityEdit cost basis — create probability edit, verify impactScore included in costBasis. (d) Test 404 for no orders. (e) Test account-level aggregation across multiple markets. (f) Test sell orders reduce position and cost basis correctly.
